mentions.raw_name: The tanner's son from Pisswater Bend
Headless marble statue of Triarch Horonno
Tyrion Lannister (POV; aliases: Yollo, Hugor Hill)
Young Griff (Prince Aegon, Prince Aegon Targaryen)
Benerro (High Priest of R'hllor in Volantis; referenced)
The tanner's son from Pisswater Bend (referenced)
Slave girl at the Painted Turtle (present)
Westeros (the Seven Kingdoms, the Sunset Kingdoms)
House Baratheon (implied via Stannis, Robert, Joffrey, Tommen)
Volantene tiger faction (political party and military)
R'hllor (Lord of Light; red priests, red temple, nightfire)
The Faith of the Seven (the Mother invoked by Lemore; septa's robes)
Dothraki (riders spotted; Khal Pono; Daenerys was khal's widow; bells in braids)
Volantene (Selhorys residents; tiger soldiers; triarchs; Old Blood)
Lyseni (the silver-haired whore, at a guess)
Ghiscari (implied via New Ghis, Yunkai, Astapor, Meereen)
Slave populations of Volantis (tears tattooed beneath right eye; four of every five are slaves)
Cyvasse board and pieces (including dragon, elephants, heavy horse, crossbows, spearmen, catapult, rabble; onyx and alabaster armies at the Painted Turtle)
Small knife (Haldon's; used for greyscale test)
Headless white marble statue of Triarch Horonno
Steel-clawed gauntlets and tiger-mask helms (Volantene soldiers)
Tortoiseshell (immense painted turtle shell above inn door)
Red candle (at cyvasse table in Painted Turtle)
White dwarf elephant (pulling cart through square)
Chamber pot (absent — Tyrion cannot find one)
Brazier (on Shy Maid deck, for cooking pike)
Greyscale (disease; Haldon tests Tyrion; can progress internally; stone men; dead grey skin; blackening nails; vinegar as folk remedy)

Azor Ahai prophecy (Benerro proclaims Daenerys as Azor Ahai returned; "from smoke and salt was she born to make the world anew"; triumph over darkness will bring endless summer; death will bend its knee; those who die fighting in her cause will be reborn)
Dragons (Daenerys has three; referenced as powerful weapon)
The Shrouded Lord (dream figure; gives the "grey kiss"; stone arms; associated with the Sorrows)
"A dwarf's cock has magical powers" (folk belief mentioned by Haldon)
Rubbing a dwarf's head for luck (folk belief practiced by tiger guard)
The seven sighs (sexual technique/training referenced for slave courtesans)
Upcoming war against Meereen/Daenerys (Yunkai, New Ghis, Tolos, Elyria, Dothraki; Volantis may join)
Century of Blood (Volantene historical era; Triarch Horonno's time)
Robert's Rebellion (implied: Robert killed Rhaegar; Tywin sacked King's Landing; Connington exiled)
War of the Five Kings (implied: north in chaos, riverlands devastated, boy king on throne, rebel holds Storm's End)
Religious violence in Volantis (fighting between R'hllor followers and worshippers of other gods)
Triarch (Volantene governing office; three triarchs: Nyessos, Malaquo, Doniphos)
High Priest of the red temple in Volantis (Benerro)
First Servant of the Lord of Light (Benerro's title)
The seven sighs (a method of sexual training for slaves)
Tiger and elephant factions (Volantene political parties — tigers favor war, elephants favor trade)
Warding gesture (three-finger stabbing motion Ysilla makes to ward off evil)
